metadata.description: VQA prompts for VLM evaluation on LIBERO-GOAL scenes

question_template_catalog.template: LIST ONLY the objects that are present in the image provided and DON'T DESCRIBE THEIR POSITION OR ANYTHING ELSE!

The image shows a robotic manipulation scene in which the following objects are present: {objects_list}. Could you describe ONLY the position of {target_object} with respect to {reference_object}? Use ONLY these position attributes: left side of, right side of, behind, in front of, next to.

The image shows a robotic manipulation scene in which the following objects are present: {objects_list}. Which ONE of these objects is located {spatial_description}? Answer with ONLY the object name from the list above, nothing else.

tasks.task_name: Put the bowl on the stove

questions.template: LIST ONLY the objects that are present in the image provided and DON'T DESCRIBE THEIR POSITION OR ANYTHING ELSE!

The image shows a robotic manipulation scene in which the following objects are present: {objects_list}. Could you describe ONLY the position of {target_object} with respect to {reference_object}? Use ONLY these position attributes: left side of, right side of, behind, in front of, next to.
questions.objects_list: wooden cabinet, flat stove, wine rack, bowl, plate, wine bottle, cream cheese

type1_spatial_relation.reference_answer: The bowl in front of the wine bottle

questions.template: The image shows a robotic manipulation scene in which the following objects are present: {objects_list}. Could you describe ONLY the position of {target_object} with respect to {reference_object}? Use ONLY these position attributes: left side of, right side of, behind, in front of, next to.
questions.objects_list: wooden cabinet, flat stove, wine rack, bowl, plate, wine bottle, cream cheese

type1_spatial_relation.reference_answer: The bowl is located behind the plate

questions.template: The image shows a robotic manipulation scene in which the following objects are present: {objects_list}. Which ONE of these objects is located {spatial_description}? Answer with ONLY the object name from the list above, nothing else.
questions.spatial_description: between the wine bottle and the cream cheese
questions.objects_list: wooden cabinet, flat stove, wine rack, bowl, plate, wine bottle, cream cheese
